sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَتَجَوَّلُ فِي أَزِقَّةِ الْأَسْوَاقِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ، تَسْتَقْبِلُكَ رَوَائِحُ التَّوَابِلِ الزَّكِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَمْلَأُ الْأَجْوَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Kada šetate uličicama starih narodnih bazara, dočekuju vas mirisi aromatičnih začina koji ispunjavaju vazduh.
sentences.translationEn: When you wander through the alleys of the old traditional markets, you are greeted by the pleasant scents of spices that fill the air.

sentences.arabic: تَعْرِضُ الدَّكَاكِينُ مَجْمُوعَاتٍ مُلَوَّنَةً مِنَ الْبُهَارَاتِ مِثْلِ الزَّعْفَرَانِ النَّادِرِ، وَالْكَمُّونِ، وَالْقِرْفَةِ، وَالْفُلْفُلِ الْأَحْمَرِ الْحَارِّ.
sentences.translation: Prodavnice izlažu šarene skupine začina poput rijetkog šafrana, kumina, cimeta i ljute crvene paprike.
sentences.translationEn: The shops display colorful groups of spices such as rare saffron, cumin, cinnamon, and hot red pepper.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُسْتَخْدَمُ هَذِهِ التَّوَابِلُ لِتَحْسِينِ الطَّعْمِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ تُعَدُّ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي الطِّبِّ الشَّعْبِيِّ لِفَوَائِدِهَا الصِّحِّيَّةِ الْجَمَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi začini se ne koriste samo za poboljšanje ukusa, već se smatraju osnovnim stubom narodne medicine zbog svojih brojnih zdravstvenih prednosti.
sentences.translationEn: These spices are not only used to improve taste, but are also considered a fundamental pillar in traditional medicine due to their immense health benefits.

sentences.arabic: يَحْرِصُ الطُّهَاةُ عَلَى اخْتِيَارِ خَلَطَاتِهِمْ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ لِضَمَانِ نَكْهَةٍ فَرِيدَةٍ تُمَيِّزُ أَطْبَاقَهُمْ عَنْ غَيْرِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Kuhari paze da svoje mješavine biraju s velikom pažnjom kako bi osigurali jedinstven ukus koji izdvaja njihova jela od ostalih.
sentences.translationEn: Chefs are keen to choose their blends with great care to ensure a unique flavor that distinguishes their dishes from others.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا، تَبْقَى هَذِهِ الْأَسْوَاقُ مَتَاحِفَ حَيَّةً تَرْوِي قِصَصَ التِّجَارَةِ وَالتَّبَادُلِ الثَّقَافِيِّ عَبْرَ الْعُصُورِ.
sentences.translation: Tako ovi bazari ostaju živi muzeji koji pričaju priče o trgovini i kulturnoj razmjeni kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, these markets remain living museums that tell the stories of trade and cultural exchange through the ages.
